scripts.build: npm run test:d1 && npm run orbit:test && npm run orbit:validate && npm run og:generate && astro build && npm run site:test && npm run browser:test
scripts.worker:build: astro build --config astro.worker.config.mjs && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.jsonc --outdir dist/worker
scripts.worker:build:staging: ORBIT_SITE_URL=https://orbit-v6-staging.samett33710.workers.dev ORBIT_NOINDEX=true astro build --config astro.worker.config.mjs && node scripts/orbit-staging-assets.mjs && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.staging.jsonc --outdir dist/worker-staging
scripts.d1:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.staging.jsonc
scripts.staging:deploy: ORBIT_SITE_URL=https://orbit-v6-staging.samett33710.workers.dev ORBIT_NOINDEX=true astro build --config astro.worker.config.mjs && node scripts/orbit-staging-assets.mjs && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.staging.jsonc --message 'Orbit V6 staging gate'
scripts.v6:check: npm run test:d1 && npm run check && npm run worker:build
